About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows LINC at rank 1 with an exceptional score of 95.4, driven by extraordinary long-term momentum across all timeframes—returning 1,583% over 10 years, 525% over 5 years, and 157% over 1 year, all while beating SPY by 1,364% over the decade. The stock displays clean momentum (signal 0.5, "clean" flag) with all four major moving averages in bullish alignment (SMA 30/50/100/200 all true), a "strong_buy" classification, and perfect ratio passes (4/4), indicating sustained acceleration in returns across multiple periods. In comparison, MPC ranks 2nd with a score of around 95, showing similar moving average strength and ratio passes but more moderate returns (565% over 10 years, 346% over 5 years) and notably weaker SPY outperformance (346% vs. LINC's 1,364% over the decade). LINC's top correlation is to XLB (materials sector, 0.36) with very low correlation to commodities like DBA (0.026), suggesting its gains stem from secular industrial or materials trends rather than broad commodity moves.
